name_en: Top-tier replica M12106 Magenta Neverfull Bandouliere Inside Out BB. This season's rendition of a classic design features a reversible version with iconic Monogram canvas and grained leather on the front and back. The detachable zip pouch can be used alone or hung on the outside. A detachable shoulder strap allows for crossbody wear, while eye-catching metal hardware adds refined details. Dimensions: 24 × 14 × 9 cm
